title: exacum subteres
intro: Exacum subteres, also known as Chinese exacum, is a type of flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of China. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Exacum subteres include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Exacum subteres is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
